leadText: Seed Flare (Japanese: シードフレア Seed Flare) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is the signature move of Shaymin.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.1.2 Pokémon Legends: Arceus Effect [ edit | edit source ] Seed Flare inflicts damage and has a 40% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense stat by two stages. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] Seed Flare cannot be used in a battle. Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Seed Flare's base power was reduced to 100. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 100 80 120 Accuracy 85% 85% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 20% 20% 40% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? May lower the target's defensive stats

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user generates a shock wave from within its body. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def. B W B2 W2 The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. It may harshly lower the target's Sp. Def. X Y OR AS The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may harshly lower the target's Sp. Def. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also harshly lower the target's Sp. Def stat. LA The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also lower the target’s defensive stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D $$$ MD S * Inflicts damage on all enemies within a 1-tile range. It may also reduce the Special Attack of enemies within a 1-tile range by 2 levels. MD S * Inflicts damage on all enemies within a 1-tile range. It may also reduce the Special Defense of enemies within a 1-tile range by 2 levels. B S L まわりの てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで とくぼうを ２だんかいさげる MD GtI UNUSED S MD It damages enemies in the same room. It could also sharply lower their Sp. Def.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Giratina and the Sky Warrior , Nurse Joy describes Seed Flare as a process in which Shaymin purifies the polluted air it inhales in its body and then expels it in the form of light and water.
